## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution or feature you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, use cases, or screenshots about the feature request.
